display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Used once per page.

title.purpose: Card titles, feature headings, and sub-section headers.

body.purpose: Primary reading text. Max line length: 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Badges, eyebrow text, and CTAs. Uppercase, used sparingly.

shadows.name: glass-shadow
shadows.purpose: Default resting shadow for all glass panels. Simulates the edge of a physical glass sheet.

shadows.name: glass-hover
shadows.purpose: Applied on glass hover. Slightly deeper and more luminous.

shadows.name: glow-blue
shadows.purpose: Hero-level accent glow and CTA button ambient light.

shadows.name: glow-green
shadows.purpose: Savings-related elements and positive outcome cards.

motion.name: ease-spring
motion.purpose: Spring-physics feel for hover and interactive transitions.

motion.name: ease-decel
motion.purpose: Smooth deceleration for scroll reveals and entrance animations.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default state transitions and color changes.

motion.name: duration-normal
motion.purpose: Standard transition duration for hover and focus states.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Slower transitions for card lifts and section reveals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main call-to-action. Used for WhatsApp contact and primary actions.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Revisar mi factura<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="ds-btn-icon"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="m12 5 7 7-7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: #007AFF; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, SF Pro Display, SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 122, 255, 0.3), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25); transition: transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), background 300ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), box-shadow 300ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0051D5; transform: scale(1.04); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0, 122, 255, 0.4), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(0, 122, 255, 0.2); } .ds-btn-icon { flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Used for supporting actions and alternative CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: rgba(0, 122, 255, 0.08); color: #007AFF; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, SF Pro Display, SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), background 300ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(0, 122, 255, 0.15); transform: scale(1.04); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(0, 122, 255, 0.2); }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: The default surface for content panels, feature cards, and info sections.
components.html:
Revisión clara

Te explico tu factura paso a paso, sin prisa y sin compromiso.
components.css: .ds-glass-card { position: relative; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.68); backdrop-filter: blur(44px) saturate(240%) brightness(1.05); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(44px) saturate(240%) brightness(1.05); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.58); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98), inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.012), 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.42); overflow: hidden; transition: transform 500ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), background 500ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 500ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); transform: translateZ(0); will-change: transform; } .ds-glass-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.84); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 1), inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.014), 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.52), 0 10px 30px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.024); } .ds-glass-card:active { transform: translateY(-1px) scale(0.992); } .ds-glass-card__specular { position: absolute; inset: 0 0 auto; height: 55%; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45) 35%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) 65%, transparent 100%); pointer-events: none; z-index: 1; } .ds-glass-card__content { position: relative; z-index: 2; padding: 1.5rem; } .ds-glass-card__title { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, SF Pro Display, SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.375rem; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #000000; margin: 0 0 0.75rem; } .ds-glass-card__body { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, SF Pro Display, SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.6; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #6E6E73; margin: 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input for the contact form and bill upload fields.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 14px 1rem; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, SF Pro Display, SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #000000; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.62); border: 1px solid rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.02); transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); outline: none; min-height: 48px; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8E8E93; } .ds-input:hover { border-color: rgba(0, 122, 255, 0.22); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.76); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #007AFF; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(0, 122, 255, 0.1), inset 0 1px 2px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.02); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; }

components.name: Blue Badge
components.description: Small inline label for status, categories, and trust signals.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, SF Pro Display, SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1; border-radius: 9999px; background: #E8F4FF; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 122, 255, 0.15); color: #007AFF; }

components.name: Green Badge
components.css: .ds-badge-green { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, SF Pro Display, SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1; border-radius: 9999px; background: #E8F9ED; border: 1px solid rgba(52, 199, 89, 0.15); color: #34C759; }

components.name: Navigation Pill
components.description: Fixed top navigation bar with glass treatment.
components.html: luzariaCómo funcionaContacto
components.css: .ds-nav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 50; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; } .ds-nav__inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72); backdrop-filter: blur(28px) saturate(200%) brightness(1.03); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(28px) saturate(200%) brightness(1.03); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.58); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96), 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04); } .ds-nav__brand { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, SF Pro Display, SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.125rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #000000; } .ds-nav__link { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, SF Pro Display, SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #6E6E73; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav__link:hover { color: #007AFF; }

components.name: Icon Tile (Blue)
components.description: Small icon container used inside feature cards and info sections.
components.css: .ds-icon-tile { display: grid; place-items: center; width: 46px; height: 46px; border-radius: 18px; flex-shrink: 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0, 122, 255, 0.18) 0%, rgba(0, 122, 255, 0.06) 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(0, 122, 255, 0.2); color: #007AFF; transition: transform 350ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), box-shadow 350ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-icon-tile:hover { transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.045); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); }

narrative.overview: The luzaria design system is a warm, transparent interface that embodies the honesty of a personal energy advisor. Every surface behaves like light passing through polished glass: luminous, refractive, and impossible to hide behind. The aesthetic is unmistakably Apple-inspired — liquid glass panels, spring-physics interactions, and a cool-but-approachable palette — but the voice is human, not corporate. The glass metaphor is not decorative; it is the core argument of the brand: transparency, literally.
keyCharacteristics: Cool-neutral palette with a single saturated blue accent (Liquid Glass Blue)
Glass-morphism as the dominant surface treatment, not an occasional flourish
SF Pro Display / Text system stack: native, premium, readable
Mobile-first confidence: the design feels native on phones
Honesty-first hierarchy: the 'no saving = no change' message is central, not a footnote

rules.name: The Transparency-First Rule
rules.body: Glass panels are the default surface, not a special effect. If a section doesn't use glass, it needs a reason. The background is always visible through the surface.

rules.name: The One-Accent Rule
rules.body: Liquid Glass Blue is the only saturated color on any given screen. Green, purple, and orange appear only in their functional contexts. Never combine them decoratively.

rules.name: The Single-Voice Rule
rules.body: One font family carries every role. Do not introduce a second typeface for 'contrast' or 'personality.' The personality lives in the glass and the motion, not in the typography.

rules.name: The Glass-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are glass at rest. Cards, panels, pills, and input fields all use the glass treatment. Flat white is reserved only for the absolute base canvas.

rules.name: The No-Harsh-Shadows Rule
rules.body: Never use a shadow with a blur radius greater than 16px and an opacity greater than 0.12. The depth is in the blur and the highlight, not in a dark drop shadow.

dos: Do use glass panels as the default surface for cards, sections, and inputs.
Do include a specular highlight on every glass surface (top 55%, gradient from white to transparent).
Do use Liquid Glass Blue (#007AFF) as the only saturated accent on any screen.
Do use spring-physics easing (cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)) for hover and entrance animations.
Do keep the background a cool gray (#F5F5F7), never warm beige or cream.
Do use the single SF Pro / system font stack for all typography.
Do ensure body text stays within 65–75ch line length.
Do include visible focus-visible rings on all interactive elements.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent on cards or callouts.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) for headings.
Don't use glassmorphism as a decorative flourish on an otherwise flat surface.
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number + small label + gradient accent).
Don't create identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly.
Don't put tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as default scaffolding.
Don't use border-radius greater than 28px on cards or panels.
Don't pair a 1px border with a soft wide drop shadow (blur >= 16px) on the same element.
Don't use corporate stock photos, handshakes, or generic 'professional' imagery.
Don't use all-caps for body copy or sentences.
Don't use marketing buzzwords: streamline, empower, supercharge, unleash, transform, seamless, world-class, enterprise-grade, next-generation, cutting-edge, game-changer, mission-critical.
Don't use em dashes (—) or double hyphens (--) in copy.
Don't default to dark mode without a reason. The system is light-first.
